creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption:
New York City’s GIANT Block Party is BACK🐘

📍DUMBO Drop 2026, May 29th 3:30pm-7:30pm

#nyc #NewYork #travel #nybucketlist #dumbo

transcription.text: This giant block party in New York City is back where thousands of mini elephants will be dropped from the sky with views of the Manhattan Bridge. This is Dumbo Drop 2026 and it will be held on May 29th in Dumbo, Brooklyn.
